2 | test("passes", () => { expect(1).toBe(1); });

1 | import { test, expect } from "bun:test";
2 | test("passes", () => { expect(1).toBe(1); });
3 | test("fails - wrong value", () => { expect(42).toBe(99); });

                                                       ^
error: expect(received).toBe(expected)
